title: Today Brief History Feature
description: Non-runnable execution root for spec-9f85467c. Coordinates the APIClient addition, new BriefDetailView and BriefCardView components, TodayView refactor with fallback logic, pagination, and unit tests.
acceptance_criteria: xcodebuild test exits 0 including all new brief-list tests
Today tab shows a list of brief cards (date, topic count, headline), newest first; top card identifiable as today's
Tapping a card opens the full brief detail on the first tap
When /briefs is unavailable (404), tab still shows today's brief as a single-item list with no regression
When /briefs is available, scrolling to the end loads older briefs and pull-to-refresh reloads from the first page
List scroll position is preserved when returning from a brief detail (load-once, not on reappearance)
Not-configured / loading / empty / error states all render; cancelled fetches do not show an error
No hardcoded hex colors; Liquid Glass conventions preserved throughout
